call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about consolidating some credit card debt. 
Agent: Excellent! That's a very smart move. With this loan, you'd have one fixed monthly payment, and potentially save a significant amount on interest. The monthly payment would be around $200. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Yeah, that sounds pretty good. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the interest rate is fixed, right? 
Agent: Absolutely. 8.99% for the life of the loan. 
Eleanor: Alright, I think I'm ready to move forward. 
Agent: Fantastic! Let's just verify a few details...

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: (Sighs) Where did you get my number? I've told you people before, I'm not interested. 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We just wanted to inform you about a low introductory rate... 
Robert: Look, I'm retired. I don't need another credit card. Especially not one with a 19.99% interest rate on the Signature Credit Card, which is what you're offering, right? I read the fine print. 
Agent: Well, sir, the rate is variable, and... 
Robert: Variable means it goes UP. I'm good, thank you. Don't call me again. 
Agent: Okay, sir. Have a good day. (Click)

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. Your friend, Michael, referred you to us. He mentioned you might be interested in a Personal Loan. 
Jessica: Oh, yeah, Michael did mention something. I'm thinking about a kitchen remodel. 
Agent: That's fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. What's your timeline for the remodel? 
Jessica: Probably in the spring. I'm still getting quotes. 
Agent: Great. So, with this loan, you'd have a fixed monthly payment, and you could spread the cost over 3 or 5 years. The 5-year option would be around $290 a month. 
Jessica: Hmm, okay. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $200 origination fee, but no prepayment penalties. We also offer a rate discount if you set up automatic payments. 
Jessica: That's good to know. I'm a little worried about taking on more debt, though. 
Agent: I understand. But think about the value you're adding to your home. And with our low rate, you'll be saving money in the long run. We can also look at different loan amounts if $15,000 feels too high. 
Jessica: Maybe $12,000 would be better. 
Agent: Absolutely. Let me adjust that for you... Okay, a $12,000 loan at 7.49% would be around $235 a month. Does that sound more comfortable? 
Jessica: Yeah, that sounds much better. Let's do it.

Agent: Hello David, this is Lisa calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for our Signature Credit Card online. 
David: Oh, right. I was just checking what my options were. 
Agent: Great! We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with a credit limit of $5,000 at an interest rate of 16.99%. It offers rewards points on all purchases. 
David: 16.99%? That's pretty high. I was hoping for something lower. 
Agent: It's a variable rate, and it depends on your credit score. However, you can earn rewards points that can be redeemed for cash back or travel. 
David: I already have a couple of credit cards with rewards. I'm not really looking to open another one right now, especially with that interest rate. 
Agent: I understand. Perhaps we could explore our balance transfer options? We might be able to transfer some of your existing debt to this card with a lower introductory rate. 
David: No, I think I'm good. Thanks for the offer, though. 
Agent: Okay, David. If you change your mind, feel free to contact us. Have a good day.

Agent: Hello Ms. Rodriguez? This is Kevin from Finance Solutions. We're calling about a pre-approved Personal Loan. 
Maria: (Yelling) Are you kidding me?! This is the third time you people have called me this week! I told you, I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Ma'am, I apologize for the inconvenience. We are offering a $3,000 Personal Loan at 24.99%... 
Maria: 24.99%?! You're trying to rip me off! I'm reporting you to the Better Business Bureau! (Click)
